crumberry home about

about

i build low-level systems, security tooling, and infrastructure automation. linux internals, network protocols, kernel interfaces — the stuff between the hardware and the application.

my home lab runs isolated KVM networks, QEMU virtual machines, and container clusters. every config is reproducible, every deployment is automated, everything is logged.

when i'm not hardening boxes or breaking things in lab environments, i'm writing C, Go, Python, or Rust — depending on what needs to get done.

crumberry · 2026
